image:image.image:title: SarvamSai — A Centenary Offering
image:image.image:caption: A collectible Discovery Box honouring the centenary of Bhagawan Sri Sathya Sai Baba. 100 Discovery Boxes daily for 100 days. Opens April 24, 2026.

image:image.image:title: SarvamSai Figurine — Centenary Collectible
image:image.image:caption: The SarvamSai figurine — a 10cm hand-finished PLA collectible of Bhagawan Sri Sathya Sai Baba, sealed in a Discovery Box until April 24, 2026.

image:image.image:title: Sathya Sai Baba Centenary 100 Years Emblem 1926–2026
